hero.availability: Open to Senior AI Engineer & Product Owner roles · Bangkok

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.title: The Journey So Far
about.bio1: I'm Thanachon Supasatian, a Senior Software Engineer based in Bangkok. My 4-year journey has been intentionally broad—ranging from headless CMS platforms to Web3 smart contracts and B2B e-commerce architectures.
about.bio2: Right now, I am pivoting entirely into the AI Engineering space. I believe that integrating LLMs into existing product interfaces is the most profound shift in UX since the mobile phone.
about.bio3: My guiding philosophy is that engineering should serve the business and the end-user. I consider myself a Product Owner as much as an Engineer, and over the next 10 years, I am building the holistic skillset required to found a successful SaaS company.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Choose your reason for reaching out
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.title: The Chronicle
timeline.subtitle: A cinematic journey through milestones, projects, and growth
timeline.visionDescription: Currently exploring opportunities in AI Engineering and Product Ownership, with a vision to found a successful SaaS company in the next decade.
